data.keyword: buy himalayan salt wall panels for spa installation

result.keyword: buy himalayan salt wall panels for spa installation

items.markdown:
You can purchase Himalayan salt wall panels for spa installations as **pre-assembled "plug-and-play" units**, **complete DIY kits** , or **individual bricks** for custom builds . Pre-assembled systems from merchants like [SpiritualQuest](https://www.spiritualquest.com/salt-walls/) and [Tekna Store](https://teknastore.com/products/himalayan-salt-wall-panels?variant=46619939307739) are designed specifically for wellness centers and saunas, often featuring integrated LED backlighting and modular designs.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10911879095790173964&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.spiritualquest.com/salt-walls/#:~:text=Pre-Assembled%2C%20Plug%20'n,$1%2C085.90)[[3]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Salt-Tiles-8x4x1-Walls/dp/B0FCVKZR79#:~:text=About%20this%20Item,wall%20or%20room%20to%20life.)[[4]](https://www.etsy.com/listing/750321134/himalayan-salt-wall-panel-with-led#:~:text=Each%20Salt%20Wall%20Panel%20is,except%20for%20Alaska%20and%20Hawaii.)[[5]](https://www.etsy.com/ca/listing/750319094/himalayan-salt-wall-panel-with-led#:~:text=Our%20Salt%20Wall%20Panels%20are%20modular%20in,posted%20on%20this%20page.%20Ships%20fully%20assembled.)

Pre-Assembled Salt Wall Panels[[1]](https://www.spiritualquest.com/salt-walls/#:~:text=Pre-Assembled%2C%20Plug%20'n,$1%2C085.90)

These systems are ideal for fast installation without the mess of adhesives. They often arrive fully assembled and ready to hang or stack.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:5489343036025551852&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.spiritualquest.com/salt-walls/#:~:text=Pre-Assembled%2C%20Plug%20'n,$1%2C085.90)[[3]](https://www.ubuy.ls/en/product/HAR2BQI-norwall-lpp-2-prepasted-wall-liner-white#:~:text=What%20Stands%20Out%20The%20prepasted%20design%20ensures,users%20to%20transform%20their%20walls%20in%20minutes.)

[![Himalayan Salt Wall Panels - 24x12 inches / Interlocking / Optional LED](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161005-4353-0139-0000-7559fd8e3710:10)
Himalayan Salt Wall Panels - 24x12 inches / Interlocking / Optional LED $2,920.00 Tekna Store](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:10303624185493113209,headlineOfferDocid:10911879095790173964,productDocid:10911879095790173964&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjJ7uLt-qOTAxVIFVkFHfq-ErQQgLcPegQIBRAC) Available at Tekna Store , these interlocking panels are designed for spas and include optional LED lighting.

Offered by [SpiritualQuest](https://www.spiritualquest.com/product/himalayan-salt-cave-complete-package/) , this system includes three large panels (two 5’x2’ and one 3’x4’) and a full-spectrum LED backlight with remote control.

[![Himalayan Salt Sauna Panel with LED Backlighting | Pink or White | 4" or 12"](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161005-4353-0139-0000-7559fd8e3710:11)
Himalayan Salt Sauna Panel with LED Backlighting | Pink or White | 4" or 12"$1,595.00 $1,700 Cedar Sense](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:101849187155576751,headlineOfferDocid:12740091655018367843,productDocid:12740091655018367843&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjJ7uLt-qOTAxVIFVkFHfq-ErQQgLcPegQIBRAQ) [Cedar Sense](https://cedar-sense.com/product/himalayan-salt-wall-panels/) provides panels with professional-grade stainless steel mounting systems and dot-less LED backlighting, resistant to high sauna temperatures.

[![Himalayan Salt Brick Wall Panels](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161005-4353-0139-0000-7559fd8e3710:12)
Himalayan Salt Brick Wall Panels $1,324.99 Himalayan Salterz](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:16587257949857260181,headlineOfferDocid:5489343036025551852,productDocid:5489343036025551852&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjJ7uLt-qOTAxVIFVkFHfq-ErQQgLcPegQIBRAa) [Himalayan Salterz](https://himalayansalterz.ca/collections/salt-wall/products/salt-wall-panel) sells pre-assembled, dimmable panels that can be stacked vertically or horizontally to create large displays.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10911879095790173964&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.spiritualquest.com/product/himalayan-salt-cave-complete-package/)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:12740091655018367843&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:5489343036025551852&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.spiritualquest.com/product/himalayan-salt-cave-complete-package/)

All-in-One Installation Kits[[1]](https://www.spiritualquest.com/salt-walls/#:~:text=Pre-Assembled%2C%20Plug%20'n,$1%2C085.90)

Kits are suitable for contractors or DIY projects that require a specific wall size. They typically include the salt bricks, specialized adhesive, and lighting components.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:9476928856009156212&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14417836707118066460&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.spiritualquest.com/salt-walls/#:~:text=Pre-Assembled%2C%20Plug%20'n,$1%2C085.90)[[4]](https://www.etsy.com/listing/750321134/himalayan-salt-wall-panel-with-led#:~:text=Each%20Salt%20Wall%20Panel%20is,except%20for%20Alaska%20and%20Hawaii.)[[5]](https://www.etsy.com/market/himalayan_salt_resin#:~:text=May%20include:%20A%20kit%20to%20build%20a,needed%20to%20create%20a%20unique%20wall%20feature.)

[![3x5 Ft Himalayan Salt Bricks Wall Panel Kit including Bricks, Glue, Map and Manual](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161005-4353-0139-0000-7559fd8e3710:13)
3x5 Ft Himalayan Salt Bricks Wall Panel Kit including Bricks, Glue, Map and Manual $780.00 Etsy - Seller](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:10847895533114977641,headlineOfferDocid:9476928856009156212,productDocid:9476928856009156212&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjJ7uLt-qOTAxVIFVkFHfq-ErQQgLcPegQICBAC) Includes 60 full bricks, 15 half bricks, Saltite adhesive, and 30 ft of LED string lights, available through Etsy - Seller.

[![Himalayan Salt Wall Panel Kit 8x10, Bricks, Glue, LED Lights, Installation Manual](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161005-4353-0139-0000-7559fd8e3710:14)
Himalayan Salt Wall Panel Kit 8x10, Bricks, Glue, LED Lights, Installation Manual $3,000.00 Etsy - Seller](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:7429025346132497911,headlineOfferDocid:14417836707118066460,productDocid:14417836707118066460&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjJ7uLt-qOTAxVIFVkFHfq-ErQQgLcPegQICBAL) A large-scale kit from [Etsy - Seller](https://www.etsy.com/listing/750321134/himalayan-salt-wall-panel-with-led) containing 345 full bricks and 100 ft of LED lighting, designed for professional wellness clinics.

ELEMEANTS on Etsy offers made-to-order panels tailored to specific square footage and electrical requirements for luxury resorts.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:9476928856009156212&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14417836707118066460&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7147764835860780860&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.etsy.com/ca/listing/1543167836/fully-custom-himalayan-salt-walls#:~:text=We%20have%20custom%20created%204'%20high%20%C3%97,a%20discussion%20prior%20to%20ordering%20is%20wise.)

Bulk Bricks and Local Suppliers

If building from scratch, you can buy loose bricks and specialized salt adhesive from bulk suppliers.[[1]](https://www.google.com/viewer/place?mid=/g/11m6l0psb2)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1199168614860107281&ibp=oshop)

- **Pink Salt Wall** : A wholesale supplier located in **Middle River, MD** , providing bulk salt bricks, tiles, and specialized salt glue for commercial salt rooms.
- **Loose Brick Packs**: [Amazon](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Pink-Salt-Tiles-x4/dp/B0F88QQ24Z) offers packs of 10 or more 8"x4"x2" bricks for custom DIY spa decor.
- **[Bulk Salt Bricks (Pack of 200)](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:12926948610915801871,headlineOfferDocid:3163620595988859607,productDocid:3163620595988859607&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjJ7uLt-qOTAxVIFVkFHfq-ErQQxa4PegQIDBAG)** : Available on eBay , these are sized at 8"x4"x2" for extensive sauna or spa wall projects.[[1]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Pink-Salt-Tiles-x4/dp/B0F88QQ24Z#:~:text=Product%20Description-,Premium%20Himalayan%20Pink%20Salt%20Tiles%20%E2%80%93%208%22x4%22x2%22,spa%20d%C3%A9cor%2C%20and%20meditation%20spaces.)[[2]](https://www.google.com/viewer/place?mid=/g/11m6l0psb2)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1199168614860107281&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://jp.pinterest.com/pin/178877416445385702/#:~:text=Apr%2024%2C%202025%20-%20Pink%20Salt%20Wall,and%20wellness%20centers.%20Available%20at%20wholesale%20prices.)[[5]](https://www.ubuy.com.pk/en/product/41U5A4P0K-saltite-himalayan-salt-glue-himalayan-salt-adhesive-for-joining-himalayan-salt-bricks-the-perfect-sealant-for-blocks-and-tiles-salt-products#:~:text=Answer:%20Pink%20Salt%20Wall%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Adhesive,of%20Himalayan%20salt%2C%20ensuring%20durability%20and%20longevity.)

Would you like to know more about the **electrical requirements** for backlit panels or the specific **adhesives** needed for high-humidity spa environments?

items.markdown:
- **Pink Salt Wall** : A wholesale supplier located in **Middle River, MD** , providing bulk salt bricks, tiles, and specialized salt glue for commercial salt rooms.
- **Loose Brick Packs**: [Amazon](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Pink-Salt-Tiles-x4/dp/B0F88QQ24Z) offers packs of 10 or more 8"x4"x2" bricks for custom DIY spa decor.
